question_text: Which of the following is the best way to reduce energy waste in a home?

options.label: A
options.text: Leave lights on all day and night

options.label: B
options.text: Use thick curtains and loft insulation to reduce heat loss

correct_answer: Use thick curtains and loft insulation to reduce heat loss
explanation: Insulation materials like thick curtains and loft insulation trap air and prevent heat energy from escaping through walls, roofs, and windows. This reduces wasted energy and lowers heating costs, making it an effective way to reduce energy waste in homes.
